t_ch: 我们是不是在哪见过…
t_en: Have we met somewhere...

t_ch: …你为什么还不走？
t_en: ...Why haven't you left?

t_ch: 我说，你为什么还不走？
t_en: I said, why haven't you left?

t_ch: 这是我的房间啊。
t_en: This is my room.

t_ch: 这是我的房间啊。
t_en: This is my room.

t_ch: 你为什么还不走？
t_en: Why haven't you left?

t_ch: 我为什么要走？
t_en: Why do I have to?

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>…难道是我走错了？这不应该，出声打扰你们前，我再三确认过房间号的……</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>...Have I come to the wrong room? This can't be. Before I said anything, I even made sure that I had the right room number...</color>

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>莫非是厢区…不，楼号也弄错了？抱歉，这座酒店太大了，走廊布置也很相似，稍不注意就会迷失方向……</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>Do I have the wrong wing... or even the wrong block? I'm sorry, this hotel is huge, and the hallways all look the same. It's easy to get lost in here...</color>

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>开个玩笑，别紧张，这的确是你的房间。我只是偶然路过……</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>I jest. Take it easy, this is indeed your room. I was just passing by...</color>

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>我也在找自己的客房，听见这边有动静…便来一探究竟。幸好你没关门，不然就危险了——那个男人显然不怀好意。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>I'm trying to find my own room too, and I heard a commotion here... so I came to take a look. Luckily your door was open, or it could've gotten dangerous. That man looked like he was up to no good.</color>

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>调侃一下，别在意，这的确是你的房间。此前在走廊上，我见那位先生轻手轻脚，不像是回自己房间，就有所提防……</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>I was just teasing, please forgive me. This is indeed your room. I saw that man snooping about while I was in the hallway, it didn't seem like he was searching for his own room, so it made me wary...</color>

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>后来又看见你走进同一间房间，多少就明白了。刚才情况紧急，一时想不到其他说辞…擅作主张，希望你不要介意。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>I later saw you walking into the same room, so I began to connect the dots. The situation got a bit tense... I hope you don't mind that I pulled this stunt.</color>

t_ch: （似乎有种奇怪的感觉…）
t_en: (I have a strange feeling about this...)

t_ch: 总之，你平安无事就好。我也该回自己房间了。
t_en: Anyway, as long as you're all right. I should return to my room too.

t_ch: 不过临走前，我可以再问你一个问题吗？在你听来，或许会有些古怪，甚至失礼，但我想知道……
t_en: But before I go, can I ask you a question? You may think it somewhat strange, perhaps even rude, but I wish to know...

t_ch: …我们在哪里见过吗？
t_en: ...Have we met somewhere before?

t_ch: 我也想问…
t_en: I was about to ask too...

t_ch: 好熟悉的对话…
t_en: Woah, déjà vu...

t_ch: 可能是在梦里…
t_en: Perhaps in a dream...

t_ch: 应该没有。
t_en: Probably not.

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>…这样么。从刚才起，我就始终有种熟悉的感觉…也许这就是所谓的「既视感」吧，呵呵，也是一种缘分。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>...Is that so? I haven't been able to shake off this familiar feeling since just now... Maybe this is what they call déjà vu, hehe. Or it could purely be serendipity.</color>

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>说来惭愧，因为过去的某些经历，我有时会忘记一些不该忘记的事…所以这种确认也成了平常，请别在意。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>This may sound embarrassing, because I would sometimes forget stuff I really shouldn't have from past experiences... It's just a habit of mine, don't mind me.</color>

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>…对了，是「梦」。来这儿的途中我做了个梦，那梦里似乎有你的身影…好像有什么念头在我脑海中一闪而过……</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>...Yes, it was a dream. I had a dream on my way here, and I think you were in it... A blink of a thought in my head...</color>

t_ch: {NICKNAME}——这是你的名字，对吧？很高兴认识你。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, this is your name, isn't it? Pleased to meet you.

t_ch: 你怎么知道？
t_en: How do you know?

t_ch: 你还记得我？
t_en: Do you still remember me?

t_ch: 我现在这么有名了？
t_en: I'm that famous now?

t_ch: 你忘了，是那位先生临走前说的。我记性是不太好，但还不至于忘记几分钟前发生的事。
t_en: *smiles* You forget, that man mentioned it before he left. My memory's not very good, but it's not so bad that I can't remember details from just minutes ago.

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>巡海游侠，黄泉…这是他们称呼我的方式，你随意使用吧。我们应该还会再见面的。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>Galaxy Ranger, Acheron... This is what they call me. You can call me whatever you want. We will likely meet again.</color>

t_ch: 最后，只是一句浅浅的忠告…有这么一类人，他们拥有誓死不二的意志与信念，却并不打算将其用于正道。而在那位先生脸上，我看见了熟悉的神情。
t_en: Lastly, a gentle reminder... There are people who possess unwavering resolution and faith, even unto death, and they do not wield such conviction for good. And on that man's face, I see such a similar expression.

t_ch: 如果身配一柄刀，总要用它斩下些什么。而一名赌徒在满盘皆输前，也一定会破釜沉舟，孤注一掷…我只能言尽于此。
t_en: One who wears a blade must use it to cut eventually. And when a gambler has nothing to lose on the table, he will surely go for broke and bet it all on a final hand... That is all I can say.

t_ch: 在做出选择前，你应当知晓这些。告辞了。
t_en: I thought you should know all this before making a choice. Goodbye.

t_ch: （黄泉回去了…奇怪，总觉得刚才始终有种微妙的感觉……）
t_en: (Acheron left... Strange... I can't shake off this odd feeling I have...)

t_ch: （算了。虽然一波三折，但现在总算可以入梦了吧…嗯？）
t_en: (Forget it. It's taken a while, but at least I can finally enter the dream... Hmm?)

t_ch: 怎么回来了？
t_en: Why're you back?

t_ch: 还有什么事？
t_en: Is there something else?

t_ch: 重逢来得好快。
t_en: It didn't take long for a reunion.
Mmm...

t_ch: 不好意思，可以告诉我回大堂的路该怎么走吗？这附近的走廊实在太像了……
t_en: Sorry, can you point me in the direction of the lobby? All these hallways really look the same to me...

t_ch: 你为黄泉指明了路，她向你再三道谢。
t_en: You show Acheron the way, she thanks you again and again.

t_ch: 你靠近「入梦池」，甜蜜的女声自房间四周传来，空气中有香气氤氲，二者一同将你裹入怀中。这香氛甘冽、深沉、奢华。这令你想到熟成的果实，又像霞光中的远海。
t_en: You approach the Dreampool and hear the sweet voice of a female singer coming from all around the room, fragrance permeating the air. Together, these two elements envelop you in their embrace. The scent is sweet, profound, and luxurious — reminiscent of ripened fruits and a distant ocean painted by the hues of a setting sun.

t_ch: 也许，是时候入梦了。
t_en: Perhaps, it's time to enter the dream.

t_ch: 在入梦池中躺下。
t_en: Lie down in the Dreampool.

t_ch: 你伛身，躺倒在入梦池中央。冰冷的流质没过你的腰肢。女声继续在你的耳边轻语，伴有晚钟声，野风掀起荒原的簌簌声，知更鸟、沙鸥、天鹅与渡鸦的宣叙调……
t_en: You curl your body, lying down in the center of the Dream Pool. The icy liquid rises above your waist. The gentle female voice continues to whisper in your ear, accompanied by the tolling of evening bells. The wild wind rustles through the barren plains, while nightingales, seagulls, swans, and ravens add their symphony to the choir...

t_ch: 钟摆震荡。你期待着自己会进入哪一片梦中，昏昏欲睡……
t_en: Pendulum swings. You wonder what dream you'll delve into and slowly drift into drowsiness...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}！你没事吧？
t_en: {NICKNAME}! Are you alright?

t_ch: 意外地没什么感觉…
t_en: The fall didn't hurt at all!

t_ch: 呵呵，毕竟这里是「梦境」嘛。
t_en: Hehe, well you are in the Dreamscape, after all.

t_ch: 我好像看见幻觉了…
t_en: I think I'm hallucinating...

t_ch: 呵呵，这对第一次进入「梦境」的人来说是很正常的。
t_en: Hehe, that's a normal reaction for first-time visitors to the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 这里是天堂吗…
t_en: Are we in Heaven... Or?

t_ch: 呵呵，别担心，你已经顺利抵达「梦境」了哦。
t_en: Haha, there's nothing to worry about — you've arrived at the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 看来这位客人还不习惯从现实到梦境的变化啊。别担心，这种「失重」在初入梦境的旅客间很常见。
t_en: Seems like our guest here hasn't gotten used to the transition. Fret not, feeling a sense of weightlessness is normal for new visitors.

t_ch: 知更鸟，请你帮助我们的朋友更好地适应这场美梦吧。
t_en: Robin, please guide our friend in getting more comfortable with the new environment.

t_ch: 交给我吧。
t_en: Leave it to me.

t_ch: 知更鸟对她的兄长微微颔首，随后将那对葱翠的眸子对上了你。她微笑，你见她湖绿色的眼底泛起阵阵涟漪，一道巨大的旋涡随后自潭水深处升起。
t_en: Robin gives a slight nod to her brother, then locks her emerald gaze with yours. She smiles, and you see ripples shimmering in the depths of her lake-green eyes, followed by a mighty vortex emerging from the depths of the pool.

t_ch: 你的视野变得黯淡，感到身体开始溶解，与流质合而为一。你们共鸣，震颤，以令人沉静的频率浑合。你的心脏正在鼓动，引领一场协奏。
t_en: Your vision dims as your body dissolves, becoming one with the fluidity of the time-space. You resonate with and become attuned to the serene fusion of frequencies. Your heart drums, leading this symphony.

t_ch: 没事的，放轻松，很快就会过去。
t_en: Don't worry, just relax. You'll be feeling like your normal self in no time.

t_ch: 和声响起。「吸气。」{RUBY_B#他们}它们{RUBY_E#}歌唱。「呼气。」{RUBY_B#她们}它们{RUBY_E#}歌唱。本能令你照做，你感到胸腔中凝滞的流体重新流动。
t_en: The choir starts. "Inhale." They sing. "Now Exhale." They chant. Instinct compels, and the stagnant fluid in your chest begins to flow again.

t_ch: 暖意自其中传来，充盈全身。你们的旋律渐慢、渐弱，像一首摇篮曲。一道七色的幻象轻轻抚摸着你的头顶，为你阖眼，动作轻柔，满是怜爱。你感到惬意，沉沉睡去。
t_en: A gentle warmth emanates from within, saturating every inch of your being. Your melodies slow down, fade away, like a lullaby. A seven-colored illusion delicately caresses the top of your head and closes your eyes, its movements tender and compassionate. You feel contentment and drift into a deep slumber.

t_ch: 当你再度睁开眼时，方才遭遇的一切仿佛被压缩在一瞬间。你的思绪已经捕捉不到它们了，但身体却因为这刹那安眠而精力充沛——这活力简直前所未有。
t_en: You open your eyes and feel a vitality like no other. The difficulty you were experiencing a moment earlier feels like a distant memory.

t_ch: 你现在已经完全掌控梦境了，{NICKNAME}——欢迎来到匹诺康尼。
t_en: You should be feeling fully in control now. {NICKNAME}, welcome to Penacony.

t_ch: 什么意思？你对我做了什么？
t_en: What does that mean? What did you just do to me?

t_ch: 我只是稍微调整了一下你的精神状态，让你感觉舒服些。
t_en: I've merely changed your state of mind for you to feel more at ease.

t_ch: 你刚才是在对我洗脑吗…
t_en: Did you just brainwash me...

t_ch: 我只是稍微调整了一下你的精神状态，让你感觉舒服些。
t_en: I've merely changed your state of mind for you to feel more at ease.

t_ch: 刚才的声音是…
t_en: What was that sound just now...

t_ch: 是一段谐乐。
t_en: It was a song with a harmonic tune.

t_ch: 别担心。她只是利用「同谐」的共鸣对你进行了调律，以便你能更自如地在梦境中掌控自己的身体。
t_en: Relax. She just did some tuning on you with the resonance of the Harmony to allow you to control your limbs freely in the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼的美梦本质上是由「忆质」构成的世界。只有掌握它的性质，你才能在其中自由行动。
t_en: Essentially, the dream of Penacony is a world formed by memoria. Only by fully understanding its nature can you move freely within it.

t_ch: 就像是刚接触游泳的人，经常会因为无法准确地适应浮力而沉入水中；但只要身体习惯了水流，你便可以自如地漂浮在水面上。
t_en: It's like learning to swim — it's easy to sink at first when you aren't accustomed to the water, but once you get the hang of it you can float and swim on the surface effortlessly.

t_ch: 好比喻，我完全理解了。
t_en: That's a great analogy. I get it now.

t_ch: 呵呵，承蒙谬赞。我们对忆质的理解也只是浅尝辄止而已。
t_en: Thanks for the compliment. In fact, we don't really have an in-depth understanding of the memoria.

t_ch: 还挺深奥…
t_en: This is deep...

t_ch: 是啊。不过，我们对忆质的理解也只是浅尝辄止而已。
t_en: Indeed. But still, we don't really have an in-depth understanding of the memoria.

t_ch: 这么说，我能随便浮在空中？
t_en: Does that mean I can levitate in the air?

t_ch: 呵呵，理论上可以，但非常困难。毕竟我们对忆质的理解也只是浅尝辄止而已。
t_en: Theoretically, you can, but it would be very difficult to pull off. After all, we don't really have an in-depth understanding of the memoria yet.

t_ch: 除了流光忆庭的忆者，一般人很难随心所欲地操纵忆质。但没关系，在「同谐」的调律下——基本上，你可以依赖现实的物理法则理解梦中世界。
t_en: Unless you're one of the Memokeepers of the Garden of Recollection, it can be difficult at first to manipulate the memoria as you wish. But once you've been tuned by the Harmony, you can use the same laws of physics from the real world to understand how the dream world works.

t_ch: 哎呀…你瞧我，职业病又犯了。我总是改不掉这好为人师的毛病。
t_en: Oops... I've fallen into my professional habits again. I just can't seem to shake off this urge to be a know-it-all.

t_ch: 别在意，他从来都是这样。请好好享受家族为各位打造的美梦乐园吧，我们就先失陪了。祝你玩得开心！
t_en: Don't mind him — he's always like that. Please enjoy the beautiful dreamscape The Family has built for everyone. We shall take our leave. Have a blast!

t_ch: （这里就是…「梦想之地」？）
t_en: (So this is... the Dreamscape?)

t_ch: （总觉得气氛有点诡异，而且…刚才是不是有什么奇怪的声音？）
t_en: (The atmosphere here creeps me out, and... what was that weird noise just now?)

t_ch: 梦境██ █ ██酒店█ ██修缮中，请您██ █酒█ 服务██ █员指引，从指定█ █ ██进入███ █……
t_en: The dreamscape ██ █ ██ hotel █ ██ under construction. Please ██ █ receive instructions from ho█ service ██ █aff and enter the ███ █ through the designated █ █ ██...

t_ch: （这是…一张纸条？）
t_en: (A... note?)

t_ch: 你看，前台怎么聚了这么多人？不会刚下车又遇到麻烦了吧……
t_en: Hey, what's the big gathering at the concierge about? We've just arrived and there's already drama?

t_ch: （总算结束了。按照梦境护照的指引操作入梦池吧……）
t_en: (Seems like it's over. Time to work the Dreampool according to the Dreamscape Pass' instructions...)
(Hmm? He's...)

t_ch: 梦中的世界…听说匹诺康尼把梦境改造成了金碧辉煌的大都会……
t_en: A dream world... I heard that Penacony transformed the dreamscape into a majestic metropolis...

t_ch: 到底会是什么样子？好期待啊～
t_en: What exactly would that look like? I can't wait!

t_ch: 沿着这条路走就能到客房区了。
t_en: Our rooms are down this way.

t_ch: 好长一段路啊…这座酒店是否大得有点夸张了？
t_en: This is a long hallway... Is it just me, or is this hotel too big for its own good?

t_ch: 大家回去休息吧，准备好了就进入梦境。
t_en: Head back to your rooms, get some rest, and prepare to enter the dreamscape.

t_ch: （该回房间了…在正式入梦前，再和大家聊聊？）
t_en: (It's time to head back to my room... Before entering the dream, I should probably talk to the rest.)

t_ch: 哇！好大的浴缸……
t_en: Woah! What a big bathtub...

t_ch: （奇怪…我的房间门怎么开着？）
t_en: (Odd... Why's my room door open?)

t_ch: 这边！您能看到我吗？这边！
t_en: This way! Can you see me? Over here!

t_ch: 请往这边来！
t_en: Please come this way!

t_ch: （好像听到了熟悉的声音…是在画框里面吗？）
t_en: (I thought I heard a familiar voice... Is it coming from the painting?)

t_ch: 啊，您来了！太好了！
t_en: Ah, you're here! Wonderful!

t_ch: 我还以为您会注意不到我呢……
t_en: Oh, I... I thought you wouldn't notice me...

t_ch: （这扇门背后就是真正的匹诺康尼…好期待呀。）
t_en: (Behind this door is the real Penacony... I'm looking forward to it.)

t_ch: （三月七呢？是不是已经回房间了……）
t_en: (Where's March 7th? Has she returned to her room already?)

t_ch: 欢迎来到匹诺康尼，尊贵的客人……
t_en: Welcome to Penacony, honored guest...

t_ch: 这扇门似乎无法从这一侧打开。
t_en: This door appears unopenable from this side.

t_ch: 很快，您的所有理想都将跃然眼前……
t_en: Very soon, all your dreams will leap forth before you...

t_ch: 请您迈入梦池，忘记生命中的悲伤与烦忧……
t_en: Please step into the Dreampool and let go of the sorrows and worries of life...

t_ch: 闭上眼睛，任凭愉悦的记忆涌上心头……
t_en: Close your eyes, and let happy memories surge forth...

t_ch: 来世…往生……
t_en: See you... in the next life...

t_ch: 美梦…常驻……
t_en: Revel in... sweet dreams...

t_ch: 很快，现实与梦域的边界将会消融……
t_en: Very soon, the boundary between reality and dream will cease to exist...

t_ch: 欢迎光临「思绪长廊」！您可以将这里理解为入境通道，通向「黄金的时刻」。而我在这里为各位宾客提供指引。
t_en: Welcome to the Gallery of Thoughts! You can think of this as the entrance to the Golden Hour. I'm here to provide guidance to our guests.

t_ch: 我们又见面了。
t_en: We meet again.

t_ch: 咦，您记得我吗？我好开心。
t_en: Huh, you remember me? I'm so glad.

t_ch: 这里看起来好怪异。
t_en: This whole place looks weird.

t_ch: 这里是一座临时中转站，所以看起来会比较简陋…梦境中的「白日梦酒店」目前正在进行修缮工作。
t_en: This is a temporary interchange, so it looks a little rundown... The Reverie in the dreamscape is currently undergoing a revamp.

t_ch: 抱歉为您带来了不好的入住体验…但如果您去到「黄金的时刻」，相信所有的烦恼都会烟消云散的！
t_en: I apologize for any unpleasantness in your stay... but if you enter the Golden Hour, I'm sure all your troubles will dissipate in an instant!

t_ch: 「白日梦酒店」发生什么了？
t_en: What happened to The Reverie?

t_ch: 您问的是梦境中的「白日梦酒店」吗？具体细节我也不是很清楚，非常抱歉……
t_en: You're asking about The Reverie in the dreamscape, right? I'm not sure exactly either, I'm sorry...

t_ch: 「黄金的时刻」是什么？
t_en: What is "Golden Hour?"

t_ch: 也许您已经在梦境护照里阅读过了，但我可以再为您介绍一遍！
t_en: You've perhaps read about it in your Dreamscape Pass, but I can explain one more time!

t_ch: 「黄金的时刻」是匹诺康尼的十二梦境之一，对应时间为「午夜」——在这里，梦中的时间永远停留在零点前的瞬间，明天不会到来，而这一夜的狂欢也永远不会结束……
t_en: Golden Hour is one of the twelve dreamscapes in Penacony, and its time coincides with midnight. Here, the dream's time is forever stuck in the moment before midnight. Tomorrow will not come, and this night of revelry will never end...

t_ch: …啊，不过这并不代表梦中的时间是停滞的——为了避免给各位旅客造成身心负担，梦境中的时间尺度被设定为与现实一致，请您不必担心！
t_en: ...Ah, but that doesn't mean that time has stopped in the dream. To avoid any physical or mental burden on guests, time in the dream has been synced with reality's, so don't worry!

t_ch: 我刚才捡到了一张纸条…
t_en: I just picked up a note...

t_ch: 纸条？您是在房间里捡到的吗？
t_en: Note? Did you find it in the room?

t_ch: 啊…该不会是前一位住客遗留的垃圾吧……
t_en: Ah... It wasn't trash left behind by the previous guest, was it...?

t_ch: 是我粗心大意，没能打扫干净，给您添麻烦了…万分抱歉！
t_en: It was my mistake — I failed to tidy up properly, and caused an inconvenience for you... I'm truly sorry!

t_ch: 我该从哪前往「黄金的时刻」？
t_en: How do I get to Golden Hour?

t_ch: 您只要穿过那边的门扉，就可以抵达「黄金的时刻」了——祝您享受一段难忘的美梦！
t_en: You just go right through that door to reach Golden Hour. I wish you an unforgettable dream!

t_ch: 只要穿过那边的门扉，就可以抵达「黄金的时刻」了。如果您还有任何疑惑，我也很乐意为您一一解答！
t_en: Right through that doorway is Golden Hour. If you've any other questions, I'm more than happy to answer them!

t_ch: 「白日梦酒店」发生什么了？
t_en: What happened to The Reverie?

t_ch: 您问的是梦境中的「白日梦酒店」吗？具体细节我也不是很清楚，非常抱歉……
t_en: You're asking about The Reverie in the dreamscape, right? I'm not sure exactly either, I'm sorry...

t_ch: 「黄金的时刻」是什么？
t_en: What is "Golden Hour?"

t_ch: 也许您已经在梦境护照里阅读过了，但我可以再为您介绍一遍！
t_en: You've perhaps read about it in your Dreamscape Pass, but I can explain one more time!

t_ch: 「黄金的时刻」是匹诺康尼的十二梦境之一，对应时间为「午夜」——在这里，梦中的时间永远停留在零点前的瞬间，明天不会到来，而这一夜的狂欢也永远不会结束……
t_en: Golden Hour is one of the twelve dreamscapes in Penacony, and its time coincides with midnight. Here, the dream's time is forever stuck in the moment before midnight. Tomorrow will not come, and this night of revelry will never end...

t_ch: …啊，不过这并不代表梦中的时间是停滞的——为了避免给各位旅客造成身心负担，梦境中的时间尺度被设定为与现实一致，请您不必担心！
t_en: ...Ah, but that doesn't mean that time has stopped in the dream. To avoid any physical or mental burden on guests, time in the dream has been synced with reality's, so don't worry!

t_ch: 没什么了，谢谢你。
t_en: I've nothing else to ask, thank you.

t_ch: 祝您在匹诺康尼享受一段难忘的美梦！
t_en: I wish you unforgettable dreams in Penacony!

t_ch: （「梦境贩售店」…要去看看吗？）
t_en: (The Dreamscape Sales Store... Should I visit it?)

t_ch: （好热闹啊，这么多人都生活在梦境中……）
t_en: (This place is bustling. There are so many people living in the dreamscape...)

t_ch: （吓我一跳，广告牌居然会动？！）
t_en: (Wait, did that billboard just move!?)

t_ch: （看地图，那就是「梦境贩售店」了…那是…眼睛？）
t_en: (According to the map, that is the Dreamscape Sales Store... Is that... a giant eyeball?)

t_ch: 欢迎光临「梦境贩售店」，星穹列车的开拓客！
t_en: Trailblazers from the Astral Express — Welcome to Dreamscape Sales Store!

t_ch: 谁在和我说话？
t_en: Who's talking to me?

t_ch: 是我，「梦境贩售店」——您也可以叫我爱德华医生。乐意为您效劳！
t_en: It's me, the Dreamscape Sales Store. I also go by the name of Dr. Edward, and I'm happy to be at your service!

t_ch: 你怎么知道我是谁？
t_en: How do you know who I am?

t_ch: 这就是精神分析，{M#先生}{F#女士}——爱德华医生乐意为您效劳！
t_en: It's the magic of psychoanalysis, {M#sir}{F#madam}. Dr. Edward is happy to assist you!

t_ch: 您可以在这里体验到种种新奇有趣的梦境——上至克劳克影业出品、下至私人捐赠，我们应有尽有！
t_en: Here's where you get to experience all sorts of fascinating dreamscapes — from the top-notch productions of Clock Studios to private donations, we have it all!

t_ch: 如果我没猜错，您是第一次来到匹诺康尼，对吗？
t_en: If I'm not mistaken, this is your first visit to Penacony, isn't it?

t_ch: 我是。
t_en: Yes.

t_ch: 我不是。
t_en: No.

t_ch: 不，您是！
t_en: It is!

t_ch: 放心，爱德华医生会为您提供无微不至的帮助，助您选购第一款梦境，尽情享受在梦中才能体会到的视听盛宴——
t_en: Please be rest assured that Dr. Edward will provide the best service you can find in helping you purchase your first Dreamscape and indulge in an exclusive and marvelous dreamland journey...

t_ch: ——已经为您分析完成了！我想您一定会喜欢这枚梦泡。
t_en: ...And that's the end of my analysis! I'm sure you'll be a fan of this dream bubble.

t_ch: 它来自私人匿名捐赠，据说其中的记忆…属于已陨的星神阿基维利！我可以向您保证，这枚梦泡绝对适合您！
t_en: It's a contribution from an anonymous donor and is said to contain the memory of the fallen Aeon, Akivili! I can assure you that this dream bubble is perfect for you!

t_ch: 你怎么知道我有什么需求？
t_en: How do you know what I want?

t_ch: 这就是精神分析，{M#先生}{F#女士}！
t_en: It's the magic of psychoanalysis, {F#madam}{M#sir}!

t_ch: 这是阿基维利的记忆？
t_en: Is this the memory of Akivili?

t_ch: 爱德华医生不会对梦泡内容的真实性作任何担保——梦就是梦，享受它吧！
t_en: Dr. Edward does not make any guarantees regarding the authenticity of dream bubble content. Dreams are just dreams, so enjoy them!

t_ch: 我该支付多少信用点？
t_en: How many credits do I have to pay?

t_ch: 您不需要付钱！爱德华医生承诺，每位新客都可以免费体验一枚梦泡！
t_en: None! Dr. Edward promises to let every new customer enjoy their first dream bubble for free.

t_ch: 好了，让我们开始吧——请您闭上眼睛，将额头抵在梦泡上即可。
t_en: Well, let's begin. Please close your eyes and rest your forehead against the dream bubble.

t_ch: 触碰梦泡。
t_en: Touch the dream bubble.

t_ch: …星穹列车的开拓客，你是否认罪帕？
t_en: ...Trailblazer from the Astral Express, do you plead guilty?

t_ch: 怎么是帕姆？！
t_en: How come Pom-Pom is here!?

t_ch: 我现在是阿基维利了？
t_en: Am I Akivili now?

t_ch: 这是在做什么？
t_en: What's going on?

t_ch: （我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。在这枚梦泡中，您将共享梦泡主人的记忆，亲身经历他的所见所闻。）
t_en: (I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble. In the dream bubble, you'll be living through another person's past memories — you will experience what the original owner of the memory once experienced.)

t_ch: （而对梦泡中模糊不清的部分，您的潜意识会主动提取相似的概念进行补全。）
t_en: (If any details are missing from the dream bubble, your subconscious will make up for it by substituting the missing content with something similar.)

t_ch: 你犯下的罪行无可饶恕，但列车长尊重每个人义务劳动的权利……
t_en: The sins you've committed are beyond pardon, but I respect every individual's right to carry out volunteer work...

t_ch: ——给我认真做大扫除帕！
t_en: ...Give this place a thorough cleaning!

t_ch: …我在听。
t_en: ...I'm listening.

t_ch: 怎么没声了？
t_en: Why isn't there any sound now?

t_ch: 谁在说话？
t_en: Who's speaking?

t_ch: 这是要我自己给祂配音？
t_en: Do I have to do the voiceover for Akivili myself?

t_ch: （抱歉。当我收录这枚梦泡时，其中的部分音轨就已经丢失了——也许忆质也无法承载那不可言喻的声音吧。）
t_en: (My apologies. When I received this dream bubble, some of the audio tracks were missing... Perhaps, even the memoria is unable to transmit the voice of Akivili.)

t_ch: （但为了增强体验，我可以对该梦泡进行调整，这意味着您可以选择以任何人的声线为其配音——只要您足够熟悉，我就可以将您的潜意识完美复现！）
t_en: (However, I can make some adjustments to the dream bubble to improve your experience, meaning you can choose anyone's voice for Akivili's. As long as it's a voice you're familiar with, I'll be able to replicate it in your subconscious!)

t_ch: 谁的声音都可以吗？
t_en: Anyone's voice will do?

t_ch: （不，必须是您熟悉的人——除非您对声音的还原度没有要求。）
t_en: (Well, it must be someone you're close to, unless you're willing to accept a very unpleasant listening experience.)

t_ch: 非得是熟人吗？
t_en: Does it have to be the voice of someone I'm close to?

t_ch: （是的——除非您对声音的还原度没有要求。）
t_en: (Yes, unless you're willing to accept a very unpleasant listening experience.)

t_ch: 还有这么便利的功能？
t_en: That's quite a convenient feature.

t_ch: （潜意识的潜力深不可测，{M#先生}{F#女士}！）
t_en: (The subconscious has vast potential, {M#sir}{F#madam}!)

t_ch: （好了，请您作出选择吧！我会尽量满足您的需求。）
t_en: (Well, please make a decision! I'll do my best to fulfill your needs.)

t_ch: 三月七。
t_en: March 7th.

t_ch: （好的！正在为您复现……）
t_en: (Splendid! I'm rendering it as we speak...)

t_ch: （…复现完成！现在您可以更好地享用梦境了。）
t_en: (...The replication is complete! Now, you can enjoy an enhanced Dreamscape experience.)

t_ch: 那么，你，和其他乘客，是否承认对以下恶性事件负责——
t_en: Do you, as well as the other passengers, take responsibility for the following malicious conduct?

t_ch: 你们驾驶雪地车闯入泰科铵大球馆，扰乱会场秩序，致使比赛中断，并导致二十名开拓客和你们一起无偿劳动三个月，以修复大球馆外立面的严重损毁——
t_en: You rode snowmobiles into the Taikiyan Stadium and disrupted the match, causing the match to be suspended. Because of you, Twenty Trailblazers were forced to repair the severely damaged exterior of the stadium for three months without pay...

t_ch: ——你是否认罪帕？
t_en: ...Do you plead guilty to this accusation?

t_ch: …我承认。
t_en: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

t_ch: 你潜入哈衣艾怡邦立动物园，用列车组半个琥珀纪的预算买下二百五十只鼻行兽幼崽，将它们豢养在洗手间内令其无限增殖，导致大量污水灌满其他车厢——
t_en: You sneaked into the Hyai'i Zoo and splurged half an Amber Era's crew budget on <unbreak>250</unbreak> Nosewalker cubs. You kept them in the restroom, where they were left to breed and multiply uncontrollably, causing other carriages to be filled with sewage...

t_ch: ——你是否认罪帕？
t_en: ...Do you plead guilty to this accusation?

t_ch: …我承认。
t_en: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

t_ch: 你们入侵餐车后厨，向所有人宣称那里需要消杀，致使四十二块香香酥酥脆脆帕姆帕姆派不翼而飞，并带走了保鲜柜上层最后一碗列车锅，令列车长挨饿——
t_en: You barged into the kitchen of the dining carriage, claiming that the whole area needed disinfection. This resulted in the loss of <unbreak>42</unbreak> Crispy Crumbly Pom-Pom Pies. And because you also took the last serving of the Express Special in the fridge, I was left starving...

t_ch: ——你是否认罪帕？
t_en: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

t_ch: 这是你自己做的吧…但我确实拿走了列车锅。
t_en: The first one is clearly a result of your own doing... But I do admit to consuming the last serving of the Express Special.

t_ch: 咳咳。别得意，我还没报完菜名呢帕！
t_en: Ahem. Don't get carried away just yet. This is only the beginning of your list of culinary offenses!

t_ch: 以及「列车智库条目集体失踪案」、「用苏乐达浇灌观景车厢植物盆栽事件」、「休息时间针对列车长的噪音袭击」、「列车长专用零食储藏保险库入侵案」……
t_en: There are cases of entire entries disappearing from the Express data bank, the plants in the Parlor Car being watered with SoulGlad, disrupting the conductor's rest with noise, and a break-in to the conductor's exclusive snack vault.

t_ch: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
t_en: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

t_ch: （重申——我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
t_en: (Let me reiterate that I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

t_ch: 你这开拓之旅还挺「欢愉」…
t_en: This trailblazing expedition of yours is indeed an "Elating" one...

t_ch: （也许吧，但我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
t_en: (Perhaps it is, but I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

t_ch: 那会儿就有苏乐达了？
t_en: Did SoulGlad really exist in that era?

t_ch: （抱歉，为了避免某些纠纷，苜蓿草家系只允许这个品牌的饮料出现在预制梦境中。）
t_en: (My apologies. By order of the Alfalfa Family, delicious, thirst-quenching SoulGlad is the only brand of beverage permitted to appear in recorded dreamscapes.)

t_ch: 等等等等——总计四十六起恶性事件！你是否承认，它们皆由你所为？
t_en: And that's not even half the list! There are a total of <unbreak>46</unbreak> cases of malicious conduct! Do you admit to being the culprit in every case?

t_ch: 对不起…我真是世界上最糟糕的无名客。
t_en: Sorry... I am indeed the worst Nameless in the universe.

t_ch: …不，你不是帕。
t_en: ...No, you are not.

t_ch: 难道还有比我更糟糕的？
t_en: Could there be anyone worse than me?

t_ch: 当然有。
t_en: Of course there is.

t_ch: 谁？
t_en: Who?

t_ch: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
t_en: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

t_ch: 丹恒。
t_en: Dan Heng.

t_ch: （好的！正在为您复现……）
t_en: (Splendid! I'm rendering it as we speak...)

t_ch: （…复现完成！现在您可以更好地享用梦境了。）

t_en: You rode snowmobiles into the Taikiyan Stadium and disrupted the match, causing the match to be suspended. Because of you, Twenty Trailblazers were forced to repair the severely damaged exterior of the stadium for three months without pay...

t_ch: ——你是否认罪帕？
t_en: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

t_ch: …我承认。
t_en: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

t_ch: 你潜入哈衣艾怡邦立动物园，用列车组半个琥珀纪的预算买下二百五十只鼻行兽幼崽，将它们豢养在洗手间内令其无限增殖，导致大量污水灌满其他车厢——
t_en: You sneaked into the Hyai'i Zoo and splurged half an Amber Era's crew budget on <unbreak>250</unbreak> Nosewalker cubs. You kept them in the restroom, where they were left to breed and multiply uncontrollably, causing other carriages to be filled with sewage...

t_ch: ——你是否认罪帕？
t_en: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

t_ch: …我承认。
t_en: ...Yes, I plead guilty.

t_ch: 你们入侵餐车后厨，向所有人宣称那里需要消杀，致使四十二块香香酥酥脆脆帕姆帕姆派不翼而飞，并带走了保鲜柜上层最后一碗列车锅，令列车长挨饿——
t_en: You barged into the kitchen of the dining carriage, claiming that the whole area needed disinfection. This resulted in the loss of <unbreak>42</unbreak> Crispy Crumbly Pom-Pom Pies. And because you also took the last serving of the Express Special in the fridge, I was left starving...

t_ch: ——你是否认罪帕？
t_en: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

t_ch: 这是你自己做的吧…但我确实拿走了列车锅。
t_en: The first one is clearly a result of your own doing... But I do admit to consuming the last serving of the Express Special.

t_ch: 咳咳。别得意，我还没报完菜名呢帕！
t_en: Ahem. Don't get carried away just yet. This is only the beginning of your list of culinary offenses!

t_ch: 以及「列车智库条目集体失踪案」、「用苏乐达浇灌观景车厢植物盆栽事件」、「休息时间针对列车长的噪音袭击」、「列车长专用零食储藏保险库入侵案」……
t_en: There are cases of entire entries disappearing from the Express data bank, the plants in the Parlor Car being watered with SoulGlad, disrupting the conductor's rest with noise, and a break-in to the conductor's exclusive snack vault.

t_ch: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
t_en: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

t_ch: （重申——我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
t_en: (Let me reiterate that I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

t_ch: 你这开拓之旅还挺「欢愉」…
t_en: This trailblazing expedition of yours is indeed an "Elating" one...

t_ch: （也许吧，但我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
t_en: (Perhaps it is, but I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

t_ch: 那会儿就有苏乐达了？
t_en: Did SoulGlad really exist in that era?

t_ch: （抱歉，为了避免某些纠纷，苜蓿草家系只允许这个品牌的饮料出现在预制梦境中。）
t_en: (My apologies. By order of the Alfalfa Family, delicious, thirst-quenching SoulGlad is the only brand of beverage permitted to appear in recorded dreamscapes.)

t_ch: 等等等等——总计四十六起恶性事件！你是否承认，它们皆由你所为？
t_en: And that's not even half the list! There are a total of <unbreak>46</unbreak> cases of malicious conduct! Do you admit to being the culprit in every case?

t_ch: 对不起…我真是世界上最糟糕的无名客。
t_en: Sorry... I am indeed the worst Nameless in the universe.

t_ch: …不，你不是帕。
t_en: ...No, you are not.

t_ch: 难道还有比我更糟糕的？
t_en: Could there be anyone worse than me?

t_ch: 当然有。
t_en: Of course there is.

t_ch: 谁？
t_en: Who?

t_ch: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
t_en: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

t_ch: 再想想其他人…
t_en: Let me see who else...

t_ch: 姬子。
t_en: Himeko.

t_ch: （好的！正在为您复现……）
t_en: (Splendid! I'm rendering it as we speak...)

t_ch: （…复现完成！现在您可以更好地享用梦境了。）
t_en: (...The replication is complete! Now, you can enjoy an enhanced Dreamscape experience.)

t_en: You barged into the kitchen of the dining carriage, claiming that the whole area needed disinfection. This resulted in the loss of <unbreak>42</unbreak> Crispy Crumbly Pom-Pom Pies. And because you also took the last serving of the Express Special in the fridge, I was left starving...

t_ch: ——你是否认罪帕？
t_en: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

t_ch: 这是你自己做的吧…但我确实拿走了列车锅。
t_en: The first one is clearly a result of your own doing... But I do admit to consuming the last serving of the Express Special.

t_ch: 咳咳。别得意，我还没报完菜名呢帕！
t_en: Ahem. Don't get carried away just yet. This is only the beginning of your list of culinary offenses!

t_ch: 以及「列车智库条目集体失踪案」、「用苏乐达浇灌观景车厢植物盆栽事件」、「休息时间针对列车长的噪音袭击」、「列车长专用零食储藏保险库入侵案」……
t_en: There are cases of entire entries disappearing from the Express data bank, the plants in the Parlor Car being watered with SoulGlad, disrupting the conductor's rest with noise, and a break-in to the conductor's exclusive snack vault.

t_ch: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
t_en: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

t_ch: （重申——我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
t_en: (Let me reiterate that I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

t_ch: 你这开拓之旅还挺「欢愉」…
t_en: This trailblazing expedition of yours is indeed an "Elating" one...

t_ch: （也许吧，但我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
t_en: (Perhaps it is, but I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

t_ch: 那会儿就有苏乐达了？
t_en: Did SoulGlad really exist in that era?

t_ch: （抱歉，为了避免某些纠纷，苜蓿草家系只允许这个品牌的饮料出现在预制梦境中。）
t_en: (My apologies. By order of the Alfalfa Family, delicious, thirst-quenching SoulGlad is the only brand of beverage permitted to appear in recorded dreamscapes.)

t_ch: 等等等等——总计四十六起恶性事件！你是否承认，它们皆由你所为？
t_en: And that's not even half the list! There are a total of <unbreak>46</unbreak> cases of malicious conduct! Do you admit to being the culprit in every case?

t_ch: 对不起…我真是世界上最糟糕的无名客。
t_en: Sorry... I am indeed the worst Nameless in the universe.

t_ch: …不，你不是帕。
t_en: ...No, you are not.

t_ch: 难道还有比我更糟糕的？
t_en: Could there be anyone worse than me?

t_ch: 当然有。
t_en: Of course there is.

t_ch: 谁？
t_en: Who?

t_ch: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
t_en: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

t_ch: 让我再想想…
t_en: Give me another minute...

t_ch: 那个把列车炸成两截的家伙帕。
t_en: That guy who blew up the train into two pieces.

t_ch: ——这枚梦泡的内容到此为止了。不知您的感受如何？
t_en: ...That's all for the content of this dream bubble. How was your experience?

t_ch: 内容倒是挺神奇的…
t_en: It's quite fascinating...

t_ch: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
t_en: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

t_ch: 这就没了？
t_en: That's it?

t_ch: 哈哈，这是与您潜意识的渴求最契合的梦泡！如果您想反复欣赏，也可以支付信用点买下它——
t_en: Haha, this dream bubble aligns with what you desire in your subconscious! If you're interested in experiencing the dream bubble again, you can purchase it with credits...

t_ch: 这枚梦泡现在的价格是<unbreak>999,999,999</unbreak>信用点，不支持现金交易。
t_en: The current price for this dream bubble is <unbreak>999,999,999</unbreak> credits. We do not take cash.

t_ch: 这一刻还是来了…
t_en: I almost expected something like this...

t_ch: 我承认这枚梦泡价格不菲——您可以再考虑一下！
t_en: This dream bubble is indeed pricey. Still, please give it some consideration!

t_ch: 图穷匕见了是吧。
t_en: So that "first dream bubble for free" was just a sales pitch, huh?

t_ch: 我承认这枚梦泡价格不菲——您可以再考虑一下！
t_en: This dream bubble is indeed pricey. Still, please give it some consideration!

t_ch: 太贵了，你不如去抢！
t_en: The price tag is off the charts. You might as well go rob a bank!

t_ch: 温馨提示，抢劫在匹诺康尼是极其严重的犯罪行为！
t_en: Please allow me to remind you that robbery is a serious offense in Penacony.

t_ch: 如何？您打算买下它吗？
t_en: Well, are you going to buy it?

t_ch: 我买了。
t_en: I'll buy it.

t_ch: 非常感谢——期待您下次光临！
t_en: Thank you. Hope to see you next time!

t_ch: 不了，太贵了。
t_en: No way. It's too expensive.

t_ch: 太可惜了——期待您下次光临！
t_en: What a shame. Please come again!

t_ch: 啊，对了！鉴于您是首次在本店体验梦泡——这枚「纪念贴纸」送给您！您可以用它来装饰您的梦境护照，记录您独一无二的匹诺康尼之旅！
t_en: Oh, right! As this is your first time using the dream bubble, here's a sticker for you! You can use it to decorate your Dreamscape Pass and commemorate your unique trip to Penacony!

t_ch: （还以为上来就能找到无名客的线索，果然没那么容易……）
t_en: (I was hoping I would find some clues about the Nameless up here... Well, can't expect it to be that easy...)

t_ch: 她往那边跑了——抓住她！
t_en: She went that way. Get her!

t_ch: （怎么回事，什么动静？）
t_en: (What's going on? What's all the commotion about?)

t_ch: 别想跑！你这个偷渡犯！
t_en: Don't even think about running away, you stowaway!

t_ch: 不、不好意思！请帮帮我……
t_en: S—Sorry for bothering you! Please, I need your help...

t_ch: 怎么了，我来帮你。
t_en: How can I help?

t_ch: 什么情况，你是谁？
t_en: What happened? Who are you?

t_ch: 保护美少女我义不容辞！
t_en: I'll do my best to protect a pretty young lady!

t_ch: 伙计们，她还有共犯！
t_en: Hey, look! She has an accomplice!

t_ch: 正好！给我一起拿下！
t_en: Good work! Now we can nab them both in one go!

t_ch: 行了行了，小子们——到此为止。
t_en: That's enough, boys.

t_ch: 长、长官？
t_en: S—Sir?

t_ch: 你们是怎么办事儿的？睁大眼睛瞧瞧，这姑娘是我们要找的偷渡犯吗？
t_en: What's gotten into you all? Open your eyes and take a good look. Is this lady the stowaway we're looking for?

t_ch: 咦，这…这人是谁？
t_en: Eh? Who... Who's this?

t_ch: 你不知道么？棕色头发、灰马甲——这位就是家族派来看护谐乐大典的治安官啊。
t_en: Don't you know him? Look at his brown hair and gray vest. He's the officer sent here by The Family to maintain order at the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 原、原来如此…报告长官，我们正在捉拿偷渡犯——就是这个小姑娘，可疑得很，一定是她！
t_en: I—I see... Sir, the thing is, we're trying to apprehend a stowaway, and that young lady there looks very suspicious. We're sure she's the one!

t_ch: 放屁。你们再好好看看？目击报告说是个银色的家伙，你们给我抓银色头发的小姑娘？能是一回事儿吗？还和客人打上架了？！
t_en: That's nonsense. Take another look, will you? The witness report says that the suspect is a lad with silver hair, and you guys are going after a girl with silver hair. Does that even make sense? She's our guest!

t_ch: 行了，滚吧。让我来处理。
t_en: Well, just get out of my way and I'll take care of this.

t_ch: 遵命！
t_en: Yes, sir!

t_ch: 实在不好意思，让尊贵的客人看笑话了。
t_en: Sorry for all the trouble you went through back there.

t_ch: 我是猎犬家系的加拉赫，那些蠢货是我豢养的幼犬。
t_en: I'm Gallagher from the Bloodhound Family, and those idiots are some young Bloodhounds I've been training.

t_ch: 他们还年轻，不懂事，误会了我的命令，竟然把匹诺康尼的贵客当成了犯人…哎，真是有失礼数。我谨代表猎犬家系向两位致以诚挚的歉意。
t_en: Because of their youth and inexperience, they mistook an honored guest of Penacony for a criminal... This is indeed a regrettable mistake. I'd like to offer my sincerest apology to you on behalf of the Bloodhound Family.

t_ch: 偷渡犯是什么情况？
t_en: What about the stowaway?

t_ch: 银色的家伙是…？
t_en: Who's the silver-haired guy?

t_ch: 猎犬家系是什么？
t_en: Who are the Bloodhound Family?

t_ch: 猎犬家系是梦境的守门人，在这里负责包括缉拿偷渡犯在内的一系列安保工作。
t_en: The Bloodhound Family are the guards of the Dreamscape. We're in charge of the security here, and our duties include arresting people who try to enter our world illegally.

t_ch: 此前我们收到通知，说有不法分子借着盛会的幌子潜入了匹诺康尼。眼下正是谐乐大典前夕，别有用心之人不在少数……
t_en: We got a tip that some criminals were planning to take advantage of the festivities around the Charmony Festival to sneak into Penacony. Now that the festival is just around the corner, there are likely many shady characters lurking around...

t_ch: 放心吧，小姐。我相信这是一场误会，这么可爱的女孩怎么会是偷渡犯呢。
t_en: Don't worry. I believe this is just a misunderstanding. How could such a lovely girl like you be a stowaway?

t_ch: …谢谢。如果没有您出手相助，我真的不知道该怎么办了。
t_en: ...Thanks. Without your kind help, I wouldn't know what to do.

t_ch: 小意思。
t_en: Just part of the job.

t_ch: 我还有事，先告辞了。如果你们有需要，就找附近的幼犬联络我吧。祝你们享受这场美梦。
t_en: I need to get going. If you need help, you can reach out to me through the young Bloodhounds in this area. I wish you an enjoyable experience in this land of dreams.

t_ch: 多亏你刚才出手相助！不然我可能真的要…被抓走了。
t_en: I owe you a big one! If it hadn't been for you, I might have been... taken away by them.

t_ch: 乐意效劳。
t_en: I'm happy to help.

t_ch: 真的非常感谢你！
t_en: Thank you so much!

t_ch: 这可不是免费的帮助…
t_en: Well, my help doesn't come free...

t_ch: 我…我知道，受人恩惠就要付出回报！
t_en: I... I understand. It's only right to return the favors I receive!

t_ch: 银河球棒侠，使命必达！
t_en: Galactic Baseballer, at your service!

t_ch: 你说话好有趣。
t_en: You're funny.

t_ch: 我才注意到…你是无名客，对不对？是第一次来匹诺康尼吗？
t_en: By the way, I've just noticed... You're a Nameless, right? Is this your first time here on Penacony?

t_ch: 你怎么知道？
t_en: How do you know?

t_ch: 因为你身上别着星穹列车的徽章呀，我在大银幕上见过！
t_en: You have the Astral Express badge on you. I saw it on the big screen once!

t_ch: 我还知道，你们经常在银河各地到处旅行——你是受家族邀请来的吧？我…我可以担任你的向导！
t_en: I also know that you guys often travel around different places in the cosmos. Did The Family invite you here? I—I'd be happy to show you around!

t_ch: 无名客这么有名？
t_en: Are the Nameless really that famous?

t_ch: 当然了，星际和平播报前不久才宣传了你们的光辉事迹！
t_en: You bet! The Interastral Peace Broadcast recently did a whole segment about your glorious achievements!

t_ch: 我还知道，你们经常在银河各地到处旅行——你是受家族邀请来的吧？我…我可以担任你的向导！
t_en: I also know that you guys often travel around different places in the cosmos. Did The Family invite you here? I—I'd be happy to show you around!

t_ch: 想要签名的话，今天不行…
t_en: I'm not doing autographs today...

t_ch: 我不是这个意思！虽然崇拜无名客是真的……
t_en: That's not what I meant. Though I do admire the Nameless...

t_ch: 我是想说，你是受家族邀请来的吧？我…我可以担任你的向导！
t_en: The Family invited you here, right? I—I'd be happy to show you around!

t_ch: 虽然被猎犬家系的人当成了偷渡犯，但我其实是本地人哦——鸢尾花家系的艺者「流萤」！尽管只是临时演员……
t_en: Although the Bloodhounds mistook me for a stowaway, I'm actually a local. My name is Firefly, and I'm from the Iris Family. I work as a stage performer, although right now I'm just an extra...

t_ch: 没有演出的时候，我也承接格拉克斯大道周边的接待工作，如果你不介意，我可以带你体验各种有趣的东西！只要好好工作，也许就不会被纠察了……
t_en: When there are no acting gigs, I work as a guide near Glaux Avenue. If you don't mind, I can show you all the exciting things around here! Maybe if I do my job as a guide, people will stop suspecting me...

t_ch: 太好了，我正缺一个导游。
t_en: That's awesome! I happen to need a tour guide.

t_ch: 不客气，毕竟你帮了我大忙嘛！
t_en: Glad to hear that. After all, you just did me a huge favor!

t_ch: 你之前没在工作吗？
t_en: Don't you have work today?

t_ch: 今天没演出，向导工作也不是时时都有嘛…来这里的都是上上之宾，大多都有护从随行……
t_en: I'm not booked for any performances, and most visitors to Penacony don't need tour guides anyway... They're all big shots who have their own entourage with them.

t_ch: 那你现在有活干了。
t_en: Well, you have a job now.

t_ch: 谢谢，我们走吧！
t_en: Thanks. Let's go!

t_ch: 盛会之星也很现实啊…
t_en: Looks like life on the Planet of Festivities can be pretty tough...

t_ch: 没有没有！匹诺康尼是梦想汇聚的地方，盛大筵席永不落幕！只是大典将近，压力是会比较大……
t_en: No, it's not like that! Penacony is where people realize their dreams. There's always a festive atmosphere here! It's just that things can get a little crazy with the Charmony Festival drawing near...

t_ch: 那就拜托你了。
t_en: I'm counting on you for a good tour then.

t_ch: 不客气，毕竟你帮了我大忙嘛！
t_en: Glad to hear that. After all, you just did me a huge favor!

t_ch: 你也是家族成员吗？
t_en: Are you a Family member?

t_ch: 我？不，不是的…我还不是家族一员，只是在为他们工作……
t_en: Me? No, I'm not one of them — not yet. I merely work for them...

t_ch: 你注意到她垂下睫毛，环顾四周，尤其注意哄闹的人群，仿佛有什么东西正藏身其中。但很快，她又收敛情绪，将视线放回到你身上。
t_en: You notice her lowering her lashes and looking around, paying close attention to the crowd, as if something is hiding in it. But she quickly collects herself and returns her eyes to you.

t_ch: …不说这个了！我带你去游览城镇…我们走吧！
t_en: ...We can talk about that another time! Right now, I wanna give you a tour of the town... Here we go!

t_ch: 谈起大多数人入梦后的第一站，那自然就是「奥帝购物中心」！这里的梦境贩售店超级出名。
t_en: The first stop most people head to as soon as they arrive in the Dreamscape is the Oti Mall! The Dreamscape Sales Store here is super famous.

t_ch: 除此之外，还有各种奢侈品、服饰、潮流玩具店，甚至是车行——只要你的「苜蓿币」足够，想买什么东西都不成问题。
t_en: There are also stores that sell luxury goods, apparel, trendy toys, and even cars... As long as you have enough Alfalfa coins, you can buy anything you fancy.

t_ch: 这些物品不仅能在梦中流通，也可以通过额外服务「带回」现实。不过，车行的销售窗口现在暂时不对外开放…只能等以后有机会再去买车啦。
t_en: Items purchased in the Dreamscape can also be brought into reality through an extra service. Unfortunately, the transfer of automobiles to the real world is not available at the moment... You can come back for them next time.

t_ch: 购物中心外边就是广场，来这里——我请你吃好吃的～
t_en: Just outside the mall is the plaza. Follow me! I'll buy you a nice meal!

t_ch: 这边这边！
t_en: Over here!

t_ch: （借机了解一下当地，也不是坏事。）
t_en: (It's not a bad idea to get to know about this place.)

t_ch: 就是这儿啦。你听说过这种说法吗——在梦里，「饥饿」是最珍贵的香料。
t_en: We're here. Hey, have you ever heard of this saying that goes, "In a dream, hunger is the most precious spice?"

t_ch: 这里有匹诺康尼绝大多数的特色美食，像是钟表披萨、橡木蛋糕卷、苜蓿色拉…还有经典苏乐达！你随便挑吧，我买单！
t_en: Well, you can find all kinds of local delicacies here — Clockie Pizza, Oak Cake Rolls, Alfalfa Salad, and the classic SoulGlad! Feel free to pick anything you like! Today it's my treat!

t_ch: 谢谢，你真好！
t_en: Thanks. That's very nice of you!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，客气啦。
t_en: Hee-hee, you're welcome.

t_ch: 这怎么好意思…
t_en: You shouldn't have!

t_ch: 没事，下次你再请我嘛。
t_en: No worries. You can buy me a meal next time!

t_ch: 我消费水平有点高…
t_en: I should warn you, I do have very expensive tastes...

t_ch: 应、应该没问题吧，我还是有点积蓄的……
t_en: Th—That shouldn't be a problem. I have some savings left...

t_ch: 点好了吗？那我买单啦。
t_en: Are you done ordering? Then I'll pay up.

t_ch: 我最喜欢这家店的橡木蛋糕卷，每天都要吃一个。
t_en: I love their Oak Cake Rolls! I get one from here every day!

t_ch: 钱包没问题吗？
t_en: Doesn't that get expensive?

t_ch: 唔，所以每天只能吃一个……
t_en: Well, that's why I only have one per day...

t_ch: 热量没问题吗？
t_en: Aren't those high in calories?

t_ch: 没、没问题的！反正是在梦里……
t_en: I—I won't put on any weight since this is all a dream...

t_ch: 我们边走边吃吧，去下一站～
t_en: Let's walk while we eat. It's time to head to the next stop!

t_ch: 啊，这…这……
t_en: Um, this is...

t_ch: …已经点好了吗？你…挺有眼光的呢！哈哈…那、那我买单了……
t_en: ...Are you done ordering? You... you have great taste! Haha... I... I'll get the bill...
Hmm...

t_ch: 接下来…我们走这边吧……
t_en: Now... let's go this way...

t_ch: 这里就是刚才提到的奢侈品商店。
t_en: This is the luxury store I told about you earlier.
